items.title: HCL 3 Years Interview Experience | Java Spring Boot
items.description: A comprehensive collection of real technical interview questions and answers from an HCL Java Developer interview for a candidate with 3 years of experience. Covers JVM Architecture, OOPs, Collections, and Spring Boot Internals.

items.title: Java Runtime & Exception Propagation
items.description: Interview notes on JVM runtime architecture and exception propagation in Java applications.

items.title: JVM Internals: Memory, GC & Class Loading
items.description: Guide to JVM internals covering memory layout, garbage collection, class loading, and runtime performance basics.

items.title: Memory Management
items.description: Virtual memory, paging, segmentation, TLB, page replacement algorithms, and Java heap management with GC fundamentals.

items.title: Operating Systems Knowledge Base
items.description: A comprehensive knowledge base covering all major operating system concepts, with a focus on Linux internals and Java/JVM perspective.

items.title: Processes & Threads
items.description: Deep dive into processes, threads, their lifecycle, memory layout, context switching, and Java/JVM perspective on concurrency primitives.

items.title: Wipro 3 Years Interview Experience [Java Springboot]
items.description: A detailed collection of real interview questions and answers from a Wipro Java Developer interview. Ideal for candidates with ~3 years of experience, covering JVM Internals, Memory Management, Spring Boot, and Core Java snippets.
